product_overview: A public-facing portfolio site that showcases interactive 3D scenes (Spline) and scroll-linked animations (Framer Motion) across three static routes. The accompanying Frontend Testing Product Specification Document (Frontend_Testing_PRD.md, pages 1-2) defines acceptance criteria and viewport/responsive checks used to validate user-facing behavior.
core_goals: Experience a high-fidelity interactive 3D hero scene on the homepage
Explore AI capabilities content via a dedicated capabilities page
Read a narrative-driven, scroll-linked animation experience on the Engine page
Navigate the site seamlessly across desktop and mobile viewports with smooth transitions

features.name: Navigation
features.description: Global navigation that lets users move between Home (/), Capabilities (/capabilities), and Engine (/engine) with smooth page transitions.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Click navigation link for /capabilities -> See /capabilities render -> Observe smooth page transition
Navigate to / -> Click navigation link for /engine -> See /engine render -> Observe smooth page transition
Navigate to / on mobile viewport (<768px) -> Open navigation menu -> Click navigation link for /capabilities -> See /capabilities render -> Observe navigation drawer closes and smooth page transition

features.name: 3D Hero Scene
features.description: An interactive Spline 3D hero on the homepage that loads, renders full-viewport, and responds to user scroll and interaction.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Observe 3D models load and scene initialize -> Scroll to interact with the 3D scene -> See scene respond to scroll and interaction
Navigate to / at 768px viewport -> Observe 3D scene scales to viewport height and remains interactive

features.name: Engine Scrollytelling
features.description: A scroll-linked animation experience on /engine where canvas animations and text overlays progress in sync with user scroll.
user_flows: Navigate to /engine -> Scroll down the page incrementally -> Observe animations trigger linked to scroll progress -> Observe text-overlays fade in synchronously with scroll
Navigate to /engine -> Scroll through the full page -> Observe canvas animations continue to update with smooth frame interpolation as content advances

features.name: Navigation
features.description: Global navigation menu with framer motion routing

features.name: 3D Hero Scene
user_interactions: Scroll and interact with the 3D scene

features.name: Engine Scrollytelling
user_interactions: Scroll down page to see animations trigger
